title: Megabeef
body:
This Modpack is required to play on the Megabeef server.
# 
The Megabeef Modpack mainly adds content mods, such as Alex's Caves, Biomes O' Plenty, Create, and many more! (See mods list)\
Several QoL mods are also included, like Mouse Tweaks, and WI Zoom!\
It's not all content though, the myriad of performance mods added allows this Modpack to run smoother than the Vanilla game (granted, thats not exectly a high bar to beat).\
 Additionally, Simple Voice Chat has been added so you can easily chat with your friends!
##
If you want, you can add or remove any mod you'd like. Note that if any server side mods are added or removed you won't be able to join the Megabeef server, but you can still play singleplayer, or use them on your own server! :)\
\
If you discover any issues with the modpack you can post them in the discord.\
Speaking of discord, Join the Discord! Not only does it allow us to whitelist you, it's also a safe place to share and post about your favourite builds and projects!\
\
Also, there's no need to manually add the Megabeef server to your server list as this Modpack has beaten you to it, and it'll be included when you launch the game.
# 
**Note**
- The mod 'Do a Barrel Roll' is disabled as default -- **Only activate this mod if you don't suffer from motion sickness!**\
(For specifics see the mods page which can be accessed in the Mods list)
